title: spiraea lasiocarpa var. villosa
intro: Spiraea lasiocarpa var. villosa, also known as the woolly spiraea, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, characterized by its small white flowers and hairy leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Spiraea lasiocarpa var. villosa include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
